PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER KROLL, BENJAMIN AS TO RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO PROPER COUNTY (MARIN) AND REQUEST FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE AMOUNT OF ATTORNEYS' FEE WAS REDUCED IN THE AMOUNT OF $650.00 BECAUSE NO REPLY WAS FILED BY COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue To Proper County (Marin) And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN T. MCGLOTHLIN, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. (510) 622-2224 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT DEPT. OF MOTOR VEHICLES;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Motion To Transfer Venue To Proper County (Marin) And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees is
Granted. No opposition filed. THE AMOUNT OF ATTORNEYS' FEE WAS REDUCED IN THE AMOUNT OF $650.00 BECAUSE NO REPLY WAS FILED BY COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
